title: Compass Clone
body:
Tired of running back and forth for your lodestone compass needs? Now with a bit of amethyst, you can simply transfer your lodestone compass magic to another, saving a trip!

All you need is a lodestone compass, a regular compass, and an amethyst shard. Shove those items any way you like in a crafting grid, and you'll get yourself two identical lodestone compasses. Enjoy!
